DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2002 Advanced From Jun-24-02 To Jun-12-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2002 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Defendant Mickey Smedley appeared in propria persona.

The Court ascertained that the defendant had not called the plaintiff to inform him of his intention to argue. The tentative ruling of the Court was adopted as its order: Defendant MICKEY SMEDLEY's demurrer is overruled with 5 days leave to answer. Other action has been dismissed. (AJR/KH) Patrick Heard CSR#11055
